title: Natacha Lu

text:
Natacha Lu
Natacha Lu joined Duke Kunshan University in November 2022 as senior director of legal and compliance affairs. In this role, she oversees a wide range of legal and external compliance matters related to the university. Her office works closely with academic units, faculty, supporting offices, staff, and university stakeholders to provide in-depth legal advice and consultation in relation to contracts, policies and procedures, intellectual property and dispute resolution, as well as supervising compliance with China’s higher education framework.
She started her career in charge of legal affairs at Nam Kwong (Group) Company Limited, a Chinese state-owned conglomerate based in Macau. She also worked for Lafarge Shui On Cement Co., Ltd. in Beijing, Lafarge S.A. in Paris and Michelin (China) Investment Co., Ltd., in Shanghai, overseeing legal and compliance matters covering business operations, cross-border transactions, foreign direct investment, and mergers and acquisitions. Before joining Duke Kunshan University, Natacha was director of legal, compliance and government relations at Otis Elevators (China) Investment Holding Company Limited.
She received her bachelor’s degree from Soochow University School of Law and a master’s degree in jurisprudence from Peking University Law School.
